service.description: Create a tenant-scoped saved run backed by one RuleSet compare scope and zero or more initial rules.

if.message: file1SystemEnumId and file2SystemEnumId must be different
file1 API source requires an endpoint
file2 API source requires an endpoint
file1 API source must use only one endpoint
file2 API source must use only one endpoint

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

if.message: file1SourceTypeEnumId '${file1SourceTypeEnumIdValue}' is not valid. Load Darpan upgrade data before creating API-backed runs.
file2SourceTypeEnumId '${file2SourceTypeEnumIdValue}' is not valid. Load Darpan upgrade data before creating API-backed runs.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file1NsRestletConfig, "file1NsRestletConfigId '${file1NsRestletConfigIdValue}' was not found", 'file1 API endpoint is not available in your active tenant.')

darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file2NsRestletConfig, "file2NsRestletConfigId '${file2NsRestletConfigIdValue}' was not found", 'file2 API endpoint is not available in your active tenant.')

if.message: file1SchemaFileName is required for JSON source 1
file2SchemaFileName is required for JSON source 2

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file1Schema, "file1SchemaFileName '${file1SchemaFileNameValue}' was not found", 'file1 schema is not available in your active tenant.')

darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file2Schema, "file2SchemaFileName '${file2SchemaFileNameValue}' was not found", 'file2 schema is not available in your active tenant.')

if.message: file1PrimaryIdExpression '${file1PrimaryIdExpressionValue}' is not present in schema '${file1SchemaFileNameValue}'
file2PrimaryIdExpression '${file2PrimaryIdExpressionValue}' is not present in schema '${file2SchemaFileNameValue}'

set.from: [ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, ruleSetName: runNameValue, description: descriptionValue, version: '1.0', createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareScope
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, description: descriptionValue ?: 'Compare scope for ' + runNameValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareSource
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, fileSide: 'FILE_1', systemEnumId: file1SystemEnumIdValue, sourceTypeEnumId: file1SourceTypeEnumIdValue, systemMessageRemoteId: file1SystemMessageRemoteIdValue, nsRestletConfigId: file1NsRestletConfigIdValue, sourceConfigId: file1UsesApiSource ? file1SourceConfigIdValue : null, sourceConfigType: file1UsesApiSource ? file1SourceConfigTypeValue : null, fileTypeEnumId: file1FileTypeEnumIdValue, schemaFileName: file1UsesApiSource ? null : file1SchemaFileNameValue, recordRootExpression: file1UsesApiSource ? null : file1RecordRootExpressionValue, primaryIdExpression: resolvedFile1PrimaryIdExpressionValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareSource
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, fileSide: 'FILE_2', systemEnumId: file2SystemEnumIdValue, sourceTypeEnumId: file2SourceTypeEnumIdValue, systemMessageRemoteId: file2SystemMessageRemoteIdValue, nsRestletConfigId: file2NsRestletConfigIdValue, sourceConfigId: file2UsesApiSource ? file2SourceConfigIdValue : null, sourceConfigType: file2UsesApiSource ? file2SourceConfigTypeValue : null, fileTypeEnumId: file2FileTypeEnumIdValue, schemaFileName: file2UsesApiSource ? null : file2SchemaFileNameValue, recordRootExpression: file2UsesApiSource ? null : file2RecordRootExpressionValue, primaryIdExpression: resolvedFile2PrimaryIdExpressionValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: reconciliation.ReconciliationRuleEngineServices.save#Rule
service-call.in-map: [ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, ruleId: ruleEntry.ruleId, sequenceNum: ruleEntry.sequenceNum, ruleText: ruleEntry.ruleText, ruleLogic: ruleEntry.ruleLogic, ruleType: ruleEntry.ruleType, expression: ruleEntry.expression, enabled: ruleEntry.enabled, severity: ruleEntry.severity, validateOnSave: false]

service.description: Create a tenant-scoped CSV saved run backed by one RuleSet compare scope.

if.message: file1SystemEnumId and file2SystemEnumId must be different

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')
[ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, ruleSetName: runNameValue, description: descriptionValue, version: '1.0', createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareScope
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, description: descriptionValue ?: 'CSV compare scope for ' + runNameValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareSource
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, fileSide: 'FILE_1', systemEnumId: file1SystemEnumIdValue, fileTypeEnumId: 'DftCsv', primaryIdExpression: file1CompareColumnValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareSource
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, fileSide: 'FILE_2', systemEnumId: file2SystemEnumIdValue, fileTypeEnumId: 'DftCsv', primaryIdExpression: file2CompareColumnValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service.description: Create a reconciliation mapping from two saved JSON schemas and selected id field paths.

if.message: schema1Id and schema2Id must be different

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, schema1, "Schema not found for schema1Id '${schema1IdValue}'", 'Schema 1 is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, schema2, "Schema not found for schema2Id '${schema2IdValue}'", 'Schema 2 is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

if.message: Selected schemas must use different systems

set.from: [reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, mappingName: mappingNameValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.mapping.ReconciliationMappingMember
service-call.in-map: [mappingMemberId: mappingIdValue + '-1', reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, systemEnumId: schema1SystemEnumId, fileTypeEnumId: 'DftJson', idFieldExpression: schema1FieldPathValue, systemFieldName: schema1FieldPathValue, schemaFileName: schema1.schemaName, createdDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.mapping.ReconciliationMappingMember
service-call.in-map: [mappingMemberId: mappingIdValue + '-2', reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, systemEnumId: schema2SystemEnumId, fileTypeEnumId: 'DftJson', idFieldExpression: schema2FieldPathValue, systemFieldName: schema2FieldPathValue, schemaFileName: schema2.schemaName, createdDate: nowTs]

set.from: [reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, mappingName: mappingNameValue, companyUserGroupId: newMappingMap.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: newMappingMap.createdByUserId, file1SystemEnumId: schema1SystemEnumId, file2SystemEnumId: schema2SystemEnumId, file1SchemaName: schema1.schemaName, file2SchemaName: schema2.schemaName, file1FieldPath: schema1FieldPathValue, file2FieldPath: schema2FieldPathValue]

service.description: Update configuration and, when provided, the executable rules for a tenant-scoped RuleSet-backed saved run.

if.message: file1SystemEnumId and file2SystemEnumId must be different
file1 API source requires an endpoint
file2 API source requires an endpoint
file1 API source must use only one endpoint
file2 API source must use only one endpoint
RuleSet saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

if.message: file1SourceTypeEnumId '${file1SourceTypeEnumIdValue}' is not valid. Load Darpan upgrade data before saving API-backed runs.
file2SourceTypeEnumId '${file2SourceTypeEnumIdValue}' is not valid. Load Darpan upgrade data before saving API-backed runs.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file1NsRestletConfig, "file1NsRestletConfigId '${file1NsRestletConfigIdValue}' was not found", 'file1 API endpoint is not available in your active tenant.')

darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file2NsRestletConfig, "file2NsRestletConfigId '${file2NsRestletConfigIdValue}' was not found", 'file2 API endpoint is not available in your active tenant.')

if.message: file1SchemaFileName is required for JSON source 1
file2SchemaFileName is required for JSON source 2

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file1Schema, "file1SchemaFileName '${file1SchemaFileNameValue}' was not found", 'file1 schema is not available in your active tenant.')

darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file2Schema, "file2SchemaFileName '${file2SchemaFileNameValue}' was not found", 'file2 schema is not available in your active tenant.')

if.message: file1PrimaryIdExpression '${file1PrimaryIdExpressionValue}' is not present in schema '${file1SchemaFileNameValue}'
file2PrimaryIdExpression '${file2PrimaryIdExpressionValue}' is not present in schema '${file2SchemaFileNameValue}'

service-call.name: reconciliation.ReconciliationRuleEngineServices.save#Rule
service-call.in-map: [ruleSetId: savedRunIdValue, ruleId: ruleEntry.ruleId, sequenceNum: ruleEntry.sequenceNum, ruleText: ruleEntry.ruleText, ruleLogic: ruleEntry.ruleLogic, ruleType: ruleEntry.ruleType, expression: ruleEntry.expression, enabled: ruleEntry.enabled, severity: ruleEntry.severity, validateOnSave: false]

service.description: List saved runs across legacy mappings and RuleSet-backed CSV runs.
Rename one tenant-scoped saved run without changing its source or rule configuration.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, mapping, "Saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found.", 'Saved run is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, ruleSet, "Saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found.", 'Saved run is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

service.description: Delete one tenant-scoped saved run and generated outputs created for it.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, ruleSetRun, "Saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found", 'Saved run is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, mappingRun, "Saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found", 'Saved run is not available in your active tenant.')

service.description: List mapping options and their system pairs for darpan-ui generic diff flow.
Load one mapping with editable schema and field details for darpan-ui settings workflows.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, mapping, "Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' was not found.", "Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' is not available in your active tenant.")

if.message: Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' does not contain any system members.
Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' requires saved schemas before it can be edited. ${mappingReadinessIssues.join(' ')}

set.from: [reconciliationMappingId: mapping.reconciliationMappingId, mappingName: mapping.mappingName, companyUserGroupId: mapping.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: mapping.createdByUserId, members: resolvedMembers]

service.description: Update an existing two-source mapping for darpan-ui settings workflows.

if.message: schema1Id and schema2Id must be different

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, mapping, "Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' was not found.", "Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' is not available in your active tenant.")

if.message: Only two-source runs can be edited in this settings workflow.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, schema1, "Schema not found for schema1Id '${schema1IdValue}'", 'Schema 1 is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, schema2, "Schema not found for schema2Id '${schema2IdValue}'", 'Schema 2 is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

if.message: Selected schemas must use different systems

set.from: [reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, mappingName: mappingNameValue, companyUserGroupId: mapping.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: mapping.createdByUserId, file1SystemEnumId: schema1SystemEnumId, file2SystemEnumId: schema2SystemEnumId, file1SchemaName: schema1.schemaName, file2SchemaName: schema2.schemaName, file1FieldPath: schema1FieldPathValue, file2FieldPath: schema2FieldPathValue]

service.description: Persist dashboard pinned reconciliation mappings for the authenticated user.
Persist dashboard pinned saved runs for the authenticated user.
Run the generic diff flow using text-based file payloads suitable for darpan-ui JSON-RPC calls.
Run a saved reconciliation flow backed by either a legacy mapping or a RuleSet compare scope.
List tenant-scoped reconciliation automations with dashboard-ready saved-run, source, schedule, last-execution, and permission summaries.

set.from: Math.max(0, pageIndex instanceof Number ? pageIndex.intValue() : ((pageIndex)?.toString()?.trim()?.isInteger() ? pageIndex.toString().trim().toInteger() : 0))
Math.max(1, Math.min(200, pageSize instanceof Number ? pageSize.intValue() : ((pageSize)?.toString()?.trim()?.isInteger() ? pageSize.toString().trim().toInteger() : 20)))

automationRows.findAll { row -> [row.automationId, row.automationName, row.description, row.savedRunId, row.savedRunName, row.inputModeLabel, row.sourceSummary, row.scheduleSummary, row.timezone, row.lastExecution?.statusLabel].any { value -> value?.toString()?.toLowerCase()?.contains(search) } }
[pageIndex: page, pageSize: size, totalCount: totalCount, pageCount: Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalCount / (double) size) as int)]

service.description: Get one tenant-scoped automation with editable source rows and dashboard summary fields.
Create or update a tenant-scoped automation against either an existing saved run or a newly-created saved run payload.

set.from: [ fileSide: ((source.fileSide)?.toString()?.trim())?.toUpperCase(), sourceTypeEnumId: ((source.sourceTypeEnumId)?.toString()?.trim()), systemEnumId: ((source.systemEnumId)?.toString()?.trim()), fileTypeEnumId: ((source.fileTypeEnumId)?.toString()?.trim()), schemaFileName: ((source.schemaFileName)?.toString()?.trim()), recordRootExpression: ((source.recordRootExpression)?.toString()?.trim()), primaryIdExpression: ((source.primaryIdExpression)?.toString()?.trim()), idValueNormalizer: ((source.idValueNormalizer)?.toString()?.trim()), systemMessageRemoteId: ((source.systemMessageRemoteId)?.toString()?.trim()), nsRestletConfigId: ((source.nsRestletConfigId)?.toString()?.trim()), sftpServerId: ((source.sftpServerId)?.toString()?.trim()), remotePathTemplate: ((source.remotePathTemplate)?.toString()?.trim()), fileNamePattern: ((source.fileNamePattern)?.toString()?.trim()), apiRequestTemplateJson: darpan.facade.reconciliation.AutomationFacadeSupport.canonicalJsonText(ec, source.apiRequestTemplateJson, 'apiRequestTemplateJson'), apiResponsePathExpression: ((source.apiResponsePathExpression)?.toString()?.trim()), dateFromParameterName: ((source.dateFromParameterName)?.toString()?.trim()), dateToParameterName: ((source.dateToParameterName)?.toString()?.trim()), safeMetadataJson: darpan.facade.reconciliation.AutomationFacadeSupport.canonicalJsonText(ec, source.safeMetadataJson, 'safeMetadataJson'), optionKey: ((source.optionKey)?.toString()?.trim()), sourceConfigId: ((source.sourceConfigId)?.toString()?.trim()), shopifyAuthConfigId: ((source.shopifyAuthConfigId)?.toString()?.trim()), omsRestSourceConfigId: ((source.omsRestSourceConfigId)?.toString()?.trim()) ].findAll { it.value != null }
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for automation changes.')

[ automationId: automationIdValue, automationName: automationNameValue, description: descriptionValue, inputModeEnumId: inputModeEnumIdValue, savedRunId: savedRunIdValue, savedRunType: savedRunTypeValue, savedRun: savedRun, newSavedRun: newSavedRun, scheduleExpr: scheduleExprValue, nextScheduledFireTime: nextScheduledFireTime, lastScheduledFireTime: lastScheduledFireTime, relativeWindowTypeEnumId: relativeWindowTypeEnumIdValue, relativeWindowCount: relativeWindowCount, customWindowStartDate: customWindowStartDate, customWindowEndDate: customWindowEndDate, maxWindowDays: maxWindowDays, splitWindowDays: splitWindowDays, windowTimeZone: windowTimeZoneValue, safeConfigJson: safeConfigJsonValue, isActive: isActive, sourceEntries: sourceEntries ]

[ automationId: savedAutomationId, fileSide: sourceEntry.fileSide, companyUserGroupId: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.currentActiveTenantUserGroupId(ec), createdByUserId: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.currentUserId(ec), sourceTypeEnumId: sourceEntry.sourceTypeEnumId, systemEnumId: sourceEntry.systemEnumId, fileTypeEnumId: sourceEntry.fileTypeEnumId, schemaFileName: sourceEntry.schemaFileName, recordRootExpression: sourceEntry.recordRootExpression, primaryIdExpression: sourceEntry.primaryIdExpression, idValueNormalizer: sourceEntry.idValueNormalizer, systemMessageRemoteId: sourceEntry.systemMessageRemoteId, nsRestletConfigId: sourceEntry.nsRestletConfigId, sftpServerId: sourceEntry.sftpServerId, remotePathTemplate: sourceEntry.remotePathTemplate, fileNamePattern: sourceEntry.fileNamePattern, apiRequestTemplateJson: sourceEntry.apiRequestTemplateJson, apiResponsePathExpression: sourceEntry.apiResponsePathExpression, dateFromParameterName: sourceEntry.dateFromParameterName, dateToParameterName: sourceEntry.dateToParameterName, safeMetadataJson: sourceEntry.safeMetadataJson, createdDate: sourceUpdatedDate, lastUpdatedDate: sourceUpdatedDate ].findAll { it.value != null }
automationRecord ? darpan.facade.reconciliation.AutomationFacadeSupport.buildAutomationRow(ec, automationRecord, true, automationSources, automationExecutions) : null

service.description: Delete one tenant-scoped automation configuration, its source rows, and its execution history rows.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for automation changes.')

service.description: Pause one tenant-scoped automation by setting isActive to N.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for automation changes.')

service.description: Resume one tenant-scoped automation by setting isActive to Y.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for automation changes.')

service.description: Run one automation immediately after active-tenant ownership and run-permission validation.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantRunAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for automation runs.')

[ automationId: automationIdValue, scheduledFireTime: scheduledFireTime ?: ec.user.nowTimestamp, windowStartDate: windowStartDate, windowEndDate: windowEndDate, hasHeader: hasHeader, outputLocation: outputLocationValue, sparkMaster: sparkMasterValue, sparkAppName: sparkAppNameValue ].findAll { it.value != null }
refreshedAutomationRecord ? darpan.facade.reconciliation.AutomationFacadeSupport.buildAutomationRow(ec, refreshedAutomationRecord, true, automationSources, automationExecutions) : null

service.description: List execution history for the active tenant, optionally filtered to one automation.

set.from: Math.max(0, pageIndex instanceof Number ? pageIndex.intValue() : ((pageIndex)?.toString()?.trim()?.isInteger() ? pageIndex.toString().trim().toInteger() : 0))
Math.max(1, Math.min(200, pageSize instanceof Number ? pageSize.intValue() : ((pageSize)?.toString()?.trim()?.isInteger() ? pageSize.toString().trim().toInteger() : 20)))
[pageIndex: page, pageSize: size, totalCount: totalCount, pageCount: Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalCount / (double) size) as int)]

service.description: List active-tenant saved runs, SFTP servers, NetSuite endpoints, system remotes, and enum options needed by automation workflows.
List generated reconciliation diff outputs within the current active-tenant scope.
Retrieve a scoped generated diff output for direct download from darpan-ui.

parameter.name: fileName
parameter.description: Generated-output file name or safe data-manager relative path returned by list#GeneratedOutputs.

service.description: Delete one scoped generated reconciliation diff output file.

parameter.name: fileName
parameter.description: Generated-output file name or safe data-manager relative path returned by list#GeneratedOutputs.

if.condition: generatedOutputFile != null && generatedOutputFile.exists() && generatedOutputFile.isFile() && !darpan.facade.reconciliation.ReconciliationOutputSupport.canAccessGeneratedOutputFile(ec, generatedOutputFile, fileNameValue)
if.message: Generated output '${fileNameValue}' is not available in your active tenant.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for generated outputs.')
